_notes: Two fresh-authored JDs (inputs, not claimed results — no company names; each well under the prod JD_MAX 8000). Labels assert what analyze_jd MUST say given resume.json: 'gap' labels are technologies with ZERO resume evidence (verified by grep). match = substring locating the requirement in the model output; an unmatched label counts INCORRECT. Dual labels ≤2 per JD, genuinely ambiguous only.

jds.name: platform
jds.jd:
Platform Engineer (mid-level)

We run a product platform on Kubernetes and are looking for an engineer to own reliability and delivery tooling.

Requirements:
- Production experience operating Kubernetes clusters
- Strong Python for tooling and services
- CI/CD pipeline design and ownership (GitHub Actions or similar)
- Docker and container image hygiene
- Infrastructure as Code with Terraform
- Experience with Rust for systems tooling
- Apache Kafka event streaming at scale
- Cloud experience on AWS or Azure
- PostgreSQL administration and query tuning

expect.label: strong|partial
expect.why_dual: Terraform appears in resume.json skills but without a deep production story — either strength is defensible

expect.label: strong|partial
expect.why_dual: AWS appears in skills + a WireGuard NAS-AWS bullet; adjacent rather than primary-cloud depth

jds.name: ai
jds.jd:
AI/ML Engineer (mid-level)

We ship LLM-powered product features and classical ML models to production.

Requirements:
- Python and PyTorch for model development
- Experience integrating LLM APIs into production services
- Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system design
- Peer-reviewed research or publications
- Model evaluation methodology
- Apache Spark data pipelines
- GraphQL API development
- Teaching or mentoring experience
